hooks.prompt:
Check if Go test files exist for recently modified Go source files.

Steps:
1. Run: git diff --name-only HEAD
2. Filter to .go files only, EXCLUDING: _test.go files, files in migrations/ dirs, cmd/**/main.go, mock files, generated files, wire files
3. For each remaining .go file, check if a corresponding _test.go exists in the same directory
4. If ANY implementation file is missing its _test.go counterpart, respond: {"ok": false, "reason": "Missing test files for: <list>. Use the /go-add-test skill to create them."}
5. If all ok or no Go files changed, respond: {"ok": true}

$ARGUMENTS
